issues.description: Loop segment crosses itself near the center of the service area.
issues.solution_hint: Reshape or split the line before tracing network connectivity.

issues.description: Two service endpoints stop close to each other but do not share a vertex.
issues.solution_hint: Confirm whether the endpoints are the same junction and snap if appropriate.

issues.description: Lateral endpoints fall within snapping tolerance but remain separate.
issues.solution_hint: Snap the endpoints after confirming they are the same service connection.

issues.description: The water network layer should rebuild its spatial index after editing.
issues.solution_hint: Rebuild the spatial index before publishing or running heavier QA.
